3. ...

paste error / traceback here

|------|-------|
| FlowLens version | e.g. 0.1.0 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.9 |
| OS / platform | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Install method | e.g. `pip install flowlens`, source |
